title: gratiola ramosa
intro: Gratiola ramosa, also known as tickseed, is a perennial herb native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its ability to support respiratory health. The health benefits of Gratiola ramosa include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate sinus congestion. Gratiola ramosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall respiratory well-being.
